title: Track B2 progress
subtitle: Measure depth, not only quantity.
overview: Module: B2 Med Integration. B2 Med strengthens abstract discussion, source response, professional communication, precise style, revision, and independent output.

sections.title: B2 med focus
rows: At B2, progress is not only how many lessons you finish, but how deeply you can use the language.
在 B2，进步不只是完成多少课，而是你能多深入地使用语言。
B2 Med frame: integrate input, thought, style, and output into one controlled response.
B2 Med 框架：把输入、思考、风格和输出整合成一个可控回应。
Explain how to track B2 progress.
解释如何追踪 B2 进步。
I would track whether I can speak longer, respond to challenges, use nuance, and reuse phrases across topics. Lesson count matters, but output quality matters more.
我会记录自己是否能说得更长、回应质疑、使用细腻表达，并跨话题复用短语。课程数量重要，但输出质量更重要。

items.en: At B2, progress is not only how many lessons you finish, but how deeply you can use the language.
items.zh: 在 B2，进步不只是完成多少课，而是你能多深入地使用语言。

items.en: B2 Med frame: integrate input, thought, style, and output into one controlled response.
items.zh: B2 Med 框架：把输入、思考、风格和输出整合成一个可控回应。

items.en: I would track whether I can speak longer, respond to challenges, use nuance, and reuse phrases across topics. Lesson count matters, but output quality matters more.
items.zh: 我会记录自己是否能说得更长、回应质疑、使用细腻表达，并跨话题复用短语。课程数量重要，但输出质量更重要。

items.en: I will make the idea precise before I try to make it sound advanced.
items.zh: 我会先让意思准确，再尝试让它听起来高级。

items.en: A strong B2 answer usually includes a condition, a limitation, or a fair counterpoint.
items.zh: 强 B2 回答通常包括条件、限制或公平的反方观点。

items.en: If the wording feels too abstract, I will add one concrete example from real life.
items.zh: 如果措辞感觉太抽象，我会加入一个来自真实生活的具体例子。

items.en: I can revise my answer for logic, tone, and rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以从逻辑、语气和节奏上修改我的回答。

items.en: This lesson is complete only when I can use the idea in my own words.
items.zh: 只有当我能用自己的话使用这个想法时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Explain how to track B2 progress.
lines.zh: 解释如何追踪 B2 进步。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I would track whether I can speak longer, respond to challenges, use nuance, and reuse phrases across topics. Lesson count matters, but output quality matters more.
lines.zh: 我会记录自己是否能说得更长、回应质疑、使用细腻表达，并跨话题复用短语。课程数量重要，但输出质量更重要。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the answer more precise or more concrete?
lines.zh: 你能让回答更准确或更具体吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will narrow the claim, add one example, and mention one limitation.
lines.zh: 可以。我会缩小主张、加入一个例子，并提到一个限制。

items.en: Explain how to track B2 progress.
items.zh: 解释如何追踪 B2 进步。

items.en: Answer once in six sentences with a clear structure.
items.zh: 用六句话做一次结构清楚的回答。

items.en: Add one B2 phrase such as that said, in practice, arguably, or the real issue is.
items.zh: 加入一个 B2 短语，比如 that said、in practice、arguably 或 the real issue is。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite the strongest sentence more naturally.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后把最强的一句改得更自然。

items.en: Use the revised sentence tomorrow in a different topic.
items.zh: 明天在不同话题中使用修改后的句子。
